name: 15W LED Mini Wall Pack – 2030 Lumens – 5700K – IP65 Waterproof
description: ZION LED USA Mini Led Wall pack are specially manufactured for entrance lighting and outdoor lighting, 15W Mini Led Wall Pack Lighting series can be widely used in hotel building, courtyards, entrance lighting, warehouse lighting and many more areas. Also these wall-packs are water resistance. The lumen output of this light is 2030 with long lifespan, and high energy efficiency. Housing is made of aluminum alloy for excellent heat dissipation. The product has an internal IP65 driver making it dust and moisture resistant so as to be conveniently installed in locations with harsh weather conditions. An aesthetically designed luminaire, this led does have a mounting option. UL and DLC certified. Applications: Warehouses Factories Parking Lots Shopping Malls Supermarkets Logistic Centers
short_desc: Product Specs: Wattage : 15W Color Temperature : 5700K (Cool White) Lumen Output : 2030 Lumens Efficacy : 135 LM/W Beam Angle : 100° Input Voltage : 100–277V AC LED Type : SMD2835 (40 pcs, 0.5W each) Power Factor : ≥ 0.9 CRI : >80 Housing Material : Aluminum (Black finish) Waterproof Rating : IP65 (Wet Rated) Operating Temp : -4°F to 113°F Photocell : Not included Certifications : UL & DLC Listed Dimensions : 8.42″ x 5.78″ x 3.07″ Weight : 1.9 lbs Warranty : 5 Years
